6016500.title: Essex County Council elections

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Local government elections in Essex, England

6016500.description: Local government elections in Essex, England
6016500.extract: Essex County Council in England is elected every four years. Since the last boundary changes in 2005, 75 councillors are elected from 70 wards.
